{{Infobox character
| name = Gaien Arelius
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Gaien Arelius]] is a member of the [[Arelius family]] who may have claim to the head family seal if the real head family was wiped out.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Gaien Arelius]] revoked [[Eithan]]'s position.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gaien Arelius]] is the Patriarch of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Gaien Arelius]] is an aging [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
